sentences.en: Let's comb your hair before breakfast.
sentences.zh: 吃早餐前先梳頭髮。
sentences.ipa: /lets koʊm jʊər her bɪˈfɔːr ˈbrekfəst/

sentences.en: Please don't play with your food.
sentences.zh: 請不要玩你的食物。
sentences.ipa: /pliːz doʊnt pleɪ wɪð jʊər fuːd/

sentences.en: Which stuffed animal do you want tonight?
sentences.zh: 你今晚想要哪隻填充玩偶？
sentences.ipa: /wɪtʃ stʌft ˈænɪməl duː juː wɑːnt təˈnaɪt/

sentences.en: What do you want to see first?
sentences.zh: 你想先看什麼？
sentences.ipa: /wʌt duː juː wɑːnt tuː siː fɜːrst/

sentences.en: Let's find some friends to play with.
sentences.zh: 我們去找些朋友一起玩吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets faɪnd sʌm frendz tuː pleɪ wɪð/

sentences.en: Let's sign your permission slip tonight.
sentences.zh: 我們今晚來簽你的同意書。
sentences.ipa: /lets saɪn jʊər pərˈmɪʃən slɪp təˈnaɪt/

sentences.en: Let's check your homework together.
sentences.zh: 我們一起檢查你的功課吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets tʃek jʊər ˈhoʊmwɜːrk təˈɡeðər/

sentences.en: That was very kind of you to share.
sentences.zh: 你願意分享真的很貼心。
sentences.ipa: /ðæt wʌz ˈveri kaɪnd ʌv juː tuː ʃer/

sentences.en: It's alright to cry, I'm right here.
sentences.zh: 哭出來沒關係，我就在這裡。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ɔːlˈraɪt tuː kraɪ aɪm raɪt hɪr/

sentences.en: Rules keep everyone safe, that's why we have them.
sentences.zh: 規矩讓大家都安全，這就是為什麼我們要有規矩。
sentences.ipa: /ruːlz kiːp ˈevriwʌn seɪf ðæts waɪ wiː hæv ðəm/

sentences.en: Look how much you've improved!
sentences.zh: 你看你進步了多少！
sentences.ipa: /lʊk haʊ mʌtʃ juːv ɪmˈpruːvd/

sentences.en: Look both ways before you cross.
sentences.zh: 過馬路前要看左右兩邊。
sentences.ipa: /lʊk boʊθ weɪz bɪˈfɔːr juː krɔːs/

sentences.en: Take your medicine, then you'll feel better.
sentences.zh: 吃藥後你就會好一點了。
sentences.ipa: /teɪk jʊər ˈmedɪsən ðen juːl fiːl ˈbetər/

sentences.en: Remember to be polite at Grandma's house.
sentences.zh: 在奶奶家要記得有禮貌。
sentences.ipa: /rɪˈmembər tuː biː pəˈlaɪt æt ˈɡrænmɑːz haʊs/

sentences.en: It's kind to include everyone in the game.
sentences.zh: 讓大家都能加入遊戲是很貼心的。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts kaɪnd tuː ɪnˈkluːd ˈevriwʌn ɪn ðə ɡeɪm/

sentences.en: It's polite to knock before entering.
sentences.zh: 進去前先敲門是有禮貌的。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts pəˈlaɪt tuː nɑːk bɪˈfɔːr ˈentərɪŋ/

sentences.en: It's windy, hold onto your hat.
sentences.zh: 風很大，抓緊你的帽子。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ˈwɪndi hoʊld ˈɑːntuː jʊər hæt/

sentences.en: Your screen time is up for today.
sentences.zh: 你今天的螢幕時間用完了。
sentences.ipa: /jʊər skriːn taɪm ɪz ʌp fɔːr təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: It's time to open your presents!
sentences.zh: 該打開你的禮物囉！
sentences.ipa: /ɪts taɪm tuː ˈoʊpən jʊər ˈprezənts/

sentences.en: Let's turn the page and find out.
sentences.zh: 我們翻頁看看接下來怎樣吧。
sentences.ipa: /lets tɜːrn ðə peɪdʒ ənd faɪnd aʊt/
